---
bibliography: references.bib
---

# Project plan

## Start-up phase (Month 1)

-   Set up a public project board (GitHub Projects) to track milestones and allow community visibility.
-   Review and triage existing open issues in both repositories.
-   Define the full list of spatial functions to be implemented, prioritised by user demand.
-   Both packages are already licensed under GPL-3 and hosted on GitHub; no changes needed.

## Technical delivery

| Month | Work |
|-------------|---------------------------------------------------------|
| 1-12 | Implement missing spatial functions in {duckspatial}, and add new developed functions on the way; expand {dplyr} verb support for `duckspatial_df` |
| 1–2 | Complete documentation for all exported functions in {duckspatial}; add missing `@examples` |
| 2–3 | Complete documentation for all exported functions in {duckh3}; add missing `@examples` |
| 3–4 | Expand test suite in {duckspatial} to ≥85% coverage |
| 4–5 | Expand test suite in {duckh3} to ≥85% coverage |
| 7–9 | Write vignette suite (≥3 per package) covering real-world workflows |
| 9–10 | Publish performance benchmark vignette including huge datasets |
| 10–12 | Buffer for DuckDB upstream changes, CRAN resubmissions, and community feedback |

CI against the latest DuckDB release will run throughout the entire period. The development of a new package that covers the `raster` extension will be considered.

## Other aspects

Both packages are GPL-3 and hosted publicly on GitHub. Contributions are welcome via pull requests and issues.

Progress will be communicated through:

-   Quarterly posts on the R Consortium blog.
-   Release announcements on the [author's personal blog](https://adrian-cidre.com/posts.html).
-   Short videos on YouTube covering new features and workflows.
-   A planned Udemy course providing a structured introduction to both packages.
-   Posts on social media (e.g. LinkedIn) at each milestone.

## Budget & funding plan

Estimated effort: ~5 hours/week × 52 weeks at $17.60/hr ≈ **$4,576**.

| Milestone | Deliverable | Payment (USD) |
|---------------------|------------------------|---------------|
| M1 — Month 2 | Full documentation for {duckspatial} | $750 |
| M2 — Month 3 | Full documentation for {duckh3} | $750 |
| M3 — Month 5 | ≥85% test coverage in both packages | $900 |
| M4 — Month 7 | New spatial functions + {dplyr} support | $900 |
| M5 — Month 9 | Vignette suite (≥3 per package) | $750 |
| M6 — Month 12 | Benchmark vignette + maintenance + final report | $526 |
| **Total** | | **$4,576** |
